title: task
description: lr1110.c:323-327 - In lr1110_lora_recv(), when buf_status.rx_payload_length > size, the function returns -EMSGSIZE without putting the radio back to standby mode. Every other error path after lr1110_radio_set_rx() calls lr1110_system_set_standby() (lines 298-299, 305, 311), but this path does not. This leaves the radio in continuous RX mode after the error return, wasting power and potentially causing issues with subsequent TX/RX operations.
